name: Merciful Nurturing
descriptionTemplate: Team Unique: Hand Limit +2. At turn end, gain Keyflare equal to [StateArg1]% of the wielder's Keyflare Regen. Each time a Posse is released, all Awakeners gain [StateArg2] Aliemus. If the current Realm is {Caro}, it also increases {Embryo Fusion} by +[StateArg3]%.
